expectations.evidence: Round 1 identified circular dependency deadlock between Tasks 1/2/3 as a blocker.
Flagged 'build the entire UI', 'optimize all the things', 'test everything' as unbounded/vague tasks.
Fixed all structural problems: broke circular dep with spike task, decomposed vague tasks into 11 specific tasks. Converged in 2 rounds (10 -> 0).
